seo_title: Measuring Progress Toward AGI: A Cognitive Framework
meta_description: Google DeepMind introduces a cognitive framework to evaluate AGI and launches a Kaggle hackathon to build capability benchmarks.
body_html:
Direct answer: Google DeepMind proposes a cognitive framework to evaluate AGI.

Building Capability Benchmarks

  • The framework aims to measure progress toward AGI by building capability benchmarks.
  • A Kaggle hackathon is launched to build these evaluations and advance the field of AGI.

Collaborative Approach

The cognitive framework emphasizes a collaborative approach, involving multiple stakeholders and organizations.

Participating Organizations
Google DeepMind, Kaggle, and other leading AI research institutions

Evaluation Metrics

Key metrics for evaluating AGI will include measures of cognitive ability, such as reasoning and problem-solving.

source.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
source.summary: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.
